name: Coco Robotics
relevance: Cooler-sized sidewalk delivery robots in busy urban environments; pedestrian-rich sidewalk sim plus synthetic perception data train safe operation among people.
subject: Simulation and synthetic data for Coco Robotics
email_body: Hi Zach, I am writing from DoDAO. I came across Coco Robotics and the cooler-sized sidewalk delivery robots running in busy urban environments. We help robotics teams with two things that precede training and testing on hardware: - A clean simulation world for your robot — robot model, workspace, sensors, parts, lighting, and physics, built in Gazebo or Isaac Sim. - Labelled synthetic data for your models — images, masks, depth, pose, demonstration trajectories, and edge cases, shipped in the format your team already uses. For your stack that would likely mean a pedestrian-rich sidewalk sim and synthetic perception data for safe operation among people. You can see an overview of our services here. Thanks, Ryan Smith DoDAO
